sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57684" key="klaiwmili/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλαιωμῐλία</orth>, poet. <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλᾰδοτομ-ίη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὁμιλία</etym>) <sense id="n57684.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fellowship in tears,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.573</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ammian.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
